_provenance.source: idea-engine PROPOSAL 076 (control/outbox.md block stamped 2026-07-15T11:32:35Z) + ideas/fleet/check-digit-transposition-floor-2026-07-15.md @ idea-engine main 828b18e (landed via idea-engine PR #440, merged 2026-07-15T11:37:34Z by github-actions[bot])
_provenance.hermetic: FULLY HERMETIC head (the P017-P072 unrelated-slot precedent): every constant below is invented-but-pinned in the idea file; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; no external-repo constant to re-verify firsthand
_provenance.note: values copied verbatim from the registration; the runner re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust the anchors — a mismatch is a first-class anomaly

luhn_fold_law: L(d) = 2d if d < 5 else 2d - 9 (doubling, digits summed); must be a permutation of Z10
damm_gates: rows permutations, columns permutations, zero diagonal — GATES, not assumptions; digest c0 = 0, c <- T[c][d], valid iff final c = 0

error_classes.SUB: single-digit substitution, ordered pairs a -> b, a != b: 90 per position (110 per position for the 11-symbol code)
error_classes.ADJ: adjacent transposition, ordered pairs (a, b), a != b, at a boundary: 90

LUHN_word4.note: fold on alternate positions, identity elsewhere; check = digit making the fold sum = 0 mod 10; alternate-position assignment pinned here (any alternate assignment yields per-boundary census 2)

ALL_ONES.weights_law: every weight 1 — the naive digit-sum control

typed_contacts.law: each ORDERED digit pair at a boundary sits in exactly 10 valid length-4 words (asserted directly, per boundary and per ordered pair)
typed_contacts.drafting_correction_disclosed: the drafter's first hand-derived contacts were the UNORDERED counts 30/150/900; the enumeration corrected them to 60/300/1800 before registration — reproducing 30/150/900 is the pre-registered census-contact NULL axis

certificate.statement: sum over y of tau(y) = sum sigma_i - sum sigma_{i+1} = 0 (mod 10); any permutation of Z10 sums to 45 = 5 (mod 10); 0 != 5 — so tau is never injective and some adjacent swap always escapes

quotient_reduction_spot_set.registered_as: the pinned 6-permutation spot set (36 pairs, direct count vs U(quotient)) — registered by SIZE ONLY; the six permutations were NOT enumerated in the idea file (drafter session killed by container restart; its scratch spot set unrecoverable)
quotient_reduction_spot_set.sim_chosen_disclosure: the six permutations below are SIM-CHOSEN deterministic canonical picks, disclosed here and ledgered as a VACANCY row in the anomaly census (not a match claim)

pencil_worlds_f4.a_equal_weights: weights (1, 1), length 2: a swap never changes the sum — 90/90 undetected, by inspection
pencil_worlds_f4.b_luhn_famous_miss: Luhn on the two-digit words 09 and 90 with the LEFT digit doubled: 0 + L(9) = 9 and 9 + L(0) = 9 — same digest, undetected

degeneracy_f5.all_ones: misses every transposition at every distance while catching every SUB

arm_r.role: REPORTING-ONLY — no statistical gate rides Arm R; sole gates are the draw-count sentinel and exact reproducibility
arm_r.draw_order_disclosure: per episode (sim-chosen stream order, disclosed — the registration pins seeds, N, and the 600,000-draw sentinel but not the per-episode draw order): 15 Luhn free digits, 1 Luhn ADJ boundary, 12 EAN free digits, 1 EAN ADJ boundary, 1 EAN D2 position = 30 draws, all randrange

decision_rule.REJECT: R1 (floor): min U = 2 exactly over all 3,628,800 quotients with no U = 0 bin and the Sigma-certificate checked symbolically; Luhn boundary census = 2 with miss set exactly {(0,9),(9,0)}; best all-singles LINEAR cell = 10. AND R2 (regression): ISBN-10 censuses 0 SUB and 0 transpositions at EVERY distance; EAN-13 exactly 10/90 per adjacent boundary and 90/90 per distance-2 pair (120 + 990 full-code patterns). AND R3 (exits): the pinned Damm table passes all three property gates and scores 0/900 SUB + 0/900 ADJ; the 11-ary mini-code word-enumerates to 1331 valid / 0 / 0.
decision_rule.INVALID: any F1-F6 gate failure (controls misbehaving — report, no ruling)
decision_rule.APPROVE: some quotient permutation achieves U = 0, or EAN-13's adjacent census = 0 and distance-2 census = 0
decision_rule.NULL: anything else; pre-registered axes: census-contact mismatch (30/150/900 would be the drafter regression), floor-value surprise (min U != 2 or minimizer count != 46,400 without gate failure), Damm-table failure (property gate fails — R3 falls back to the 11-ary exit alone), twin-arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

margin_ledger_registered_equality_cells.luhn_on_floor: Luhn's U = 2 sits ON the R1 floor — margin x1.00 BY CONSTRUCTION (optimality, not clearance)
margin_ledger_registered_equality_cells.ean_d2_saturated: the EAN distance-2 census 90/90 is a saturated cell (the maximum possible — no room above)
margin_ledger_registered_equality_cells.damm_adj_zero: the Damm ADJ census 0/900 is a zero cell (the minimum possible — no room below)
margin_ledger_registered_equality_cells.note: a census landing anywhere off these exact values is INVALID-or-NULL by the pre-registered axes, never a close-enough

expected_landing_disclosed: REJECT on all three conjuncts at the drafter's exact values (50/50 drafting checks PASS, exit 0); the sim re-derives everything from scratch and must not trust these

battery.byte_identity: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs (Arms A/B pure integer arithmetic, platform-independent; Arm R pinned to the stated CPython minor)
battery.anomaly_census_convention: structured by disclosure coverage (V087/V088): compared-and-matched / compared-and-mismatched / not-disclosed(vacant); mismatches are first-class anomalies
